WATCHER-WATCHER.cardsModifierDescription: Watcher cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
WATCHER-WATCHER.description:
A blind ascetic who has come to "Evaluate" the Spire.
Master of the divine Stances.
WATCHER-WATCHER.eventDeathPrevention: I must survive. Balance depends on it.
WATCHER-WATCHER.goldMonologue: [sine]I seek no wealth... but the path demands preparation.[/sine]
WATCHER-WATCHER.title: The Watcher
